title: start()
text: start() Start the UTIMER component. Explain this code operation start params time Delay : IN endparams Copy Parameters Delay —interval between two consecutive messages; formatted as " hh:mm:ss " or as " hh.mm.ss " Return Values If the start() operation fails because a timer thread could not be started, error -1414 (PROCERR_THREAD_START) is returned in $procerror . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The start() operation starts the UTIMER component sending messages. When the instance of the UTIMER component runs on a server, all servers with the same server name (UST) will receive the message. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
